Bundled browser-side LaTeX preview assets copied from:
https://github.com/SwiftLaTeX/SwiftLaTeX/releases/tag/v20022022

Included files:
- PdfTeXEngine.js
- XeTeXEngine.js
- DvipdfmxEngine.js
- swiftlatexpdftex.js
- swiftlatexpdftex.wasm
- swiftlatexxetex.js
- swiftlatexxetex.wasm
- swiftlatexdvipdfm.js
- swiftlatexdvipdfm.wasm

The upstream engine files include their own license headers.
